title: serapias lingua var. cordigera
intro: Serapias lingua var. cordigera, also known as the Tongue Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. It possesses anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of this plant have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, it is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
